title: Tunisian Crispy Cheese Fritters
description: A crispy fritter filled with rich Tunisian cheese, perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, crumble the Tunisian cheese into small pieces.
Add the flour, eggs, rich cream, breadcrumbs, crushed red pepper, and salt to the bowl with the cheese.
Mix the ingredients together until well combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the fritters to the skillet (do not overcrowd).
Fry the fritters for about 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with a side of your favorite dipping sauce.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining fritters.
Enjoy your crispy Tunisian cheese fritters!
